Talks - Crypto

Crypto Talks

Liquid Staking Protocol at NYU STERN Blockchain Lab

January 2025

Discussed the mechanics and architecture of liquid staking in DeFi, focusing on protocols like Lido and their impact on the Ethereum ecosystem with Professors and Researchers. Read about it..

Navigating Space with Mathematics

November 2024

Hosted a session with an ISRO scientist, Gurpreet Singh, discussing the vital role of mathematics in space navigation and its real-world applications. Watch the session.
